00699|     
00700|     console.log('Loading batch tokens for chain:', chain.displayName, 'vmType:', vmType)
00701|     
00702|     // Check if we have the appropriate wallet for this VM type
00703|     if (vmType === 'svm' && !solanaAddress) {
00704|       toast.error('Please connect your Solana wallet to detect tokens')
00705|       return
00706|     }
00707|     
00708|     if ((vmType === 'evm' || vmType === 'hypevm') && !address) {
00709|       toast.error('Please connect your wallet to detect tokens')
00710|       return
00711|     }
00712|     
00713|     setIsLoadingBatchTokens(true)
00714|     try {
00715|       console.log('Fetching currencies for chain:', chain.id)
00716|       
00717|       // Fetch popular tokens that are more likely to have balances
00718|       const fetchedCurrencies = await relayAPI.getCurrencies({
00719|         chainIds: [chain.id],
00720|         defaultList: true,
00721|         limit: 100, // Reduced from 250 to avoid rate limits
00722|       })
00723|       
00724|       console.log('Fetched currencies:', fetchedCurrencies.length)
00725|       
00726|       if (fetchedCurrencies.length === 0) {
00727|         toast.info('No tokens available for this chain')
00728|         return
00729|       }
00730|       
00731|       const tokensWithBalances: WalletToken[] = []
00732|       
00733|       // Handle different VM types
00734|       if (vmType === 'evm' || vmType === 'hypevm') {
00735|         // EVM-based chains
00736|         console.log('Fetching EVM token balances...')
00737|         const { createPublicClient, http, defineChain } = await import('viem')
00738|         
00739|         const chainConfig = defineChain({
00740|           id: chain.id,
00741|           name: chain.displayName,
00742|           nativeCurrency: {
00743|             name: chain.currency.name,
00744|             symbol: chain.currency.symbol,
00745|             decimals: chain.currency.decimals,
00746|           },
00747|           rpcUrls: {
00748|             default: { http: [chain.httpRpcUrl] },
00749|           },
00750|         })
00751|         
00752|         const publicClient = createPublicClient({
00753|           chain: chainConfig,
00754|           transport: http(chain.httpRpcUrl),
00755|         })
00756|         
00757|         const batchSize = 5
00758|         for (let i = 0; i < fetchedCurrencies.length; i += batchSize) {
00759|           const batch = fetchedCurrencies.slice(i, i + batchSize)
00760|           
00761|           const balancePromises = batch.map(async (currency) => {
00762|             try {
00763|               let balance = BigInt(0)
00764|               
00765|               if (currency.metadata?.isNative) {
00766|                 balance = await publicClient.getBalance({
00767|                   address: address as `0x${string}`,
00768|                 })
00769|               } else {
00770|                 balance = await publicClient.readContract({
00771|                   address: currency.address as `0x${string}`,
00772|                   abi: [{
00773|                     name: 'balanceOf',
00774|                     type: 'function',
00775|                     stateMutability: 'view',
00776|                     inputs: [{ name: 'account', type: 'address' }],
00777|                     outputs: [{ name: 'balance', type: 'uint256' }],
00778|                   }],
00779|                   functionName: 'balanceOf',
00780|                   args: [address as `0x${string}`],
00781|                 })
00782|               }
00783|               
00784|               const balanceFormatted = formatUnits(balance, currency.decimals)
00785|               
00786|               if (parseFloat(balanceFormatted) > 0.00000001) {
00787|                 return {
00788|                   token: currency,
00789|                   balance: balance.toString(),
00790|                   balanceFormatted,
00791|                 }
00792|               }
00793|               return null
00794|             } catch (e) {
00795|               return null
00796|             }
00797|           })
00798|           
00799|           const batchResults = await Promise.all(balancePromises)
00800|           const validTokens = batchResults.filter((t): t is WalletToken => t !== null)
00801|           tokensWithBalances.push(...validTokens)
00802|           
00803|           if (tokensWithBalances.length > 0) {
00804|             const sorted = [...tokensWithBalances].sort((a, b) => parseFloat(b.balanceFormatted) - parseFloat(a.balanceFormatted))
00805|             setWalletTokens(sorted)
00806|             setBatchTokens(sorted.slice(0, 10))
00807|           }
00808|         }
00809|       } else if (vmType === 'svm') {
00810|         // Solana-based chains
00811|         console.log('Fetching Solana token balances for address:', solanaAddress)
00812|         
00813|         if (!solanaAddress) {
00814|           throw new Error('Solana wallet not connected')
00815|         }
00816|         
00817|         const solanaRpcUrl = chain.httpRpcUrl
00818|         
00819|         for (const currency of fetchedCurrencies) {
00820|           try {
00821|             let balance = BigInt(0)
00822|             
00823|             if (currency.metadata?.isNative || currency.address === '0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000') {
00824|               // Native SOL balance
00825|               const response = await fetch(solanaRpcUrl, {
00826|                 method: 'POST',
00827|                 headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
00828|                 body: JSON.stringify({
00829|                   jsonrpc: '2.0',
00830|                   id: 1,
00831|                   method: 'getBalance',
00832|                   params: [solanaAddress]
00833|                 })
00834|               })
00835|               
00836|               const data = await response.json()
00837|               if (data.result && data.result.value !== undefined) {
00838|                 balance = BigInt(data.result.value)
00839|               }
00840|             } else {
00841|               // SPL token balance
00842|               const response = await fetch(solanaRpcUrl, {
00843|                 method: 'POST',
00844|                 headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
00845|                 body: JSON.stringify({
00846|                   jsonrpc: '2.0',
00847|                   id: 1,
00848|                   method: 'getTokenAccountsByOwner',
00849|                   params: [
00850|                     solanaAddress,
00851|                     { mint: currency.address },
00852|                     { encoding: 'jsonParsed' }
00853|                   ]
00854|                 })
00855|               })
00856|               
00857|               const data = await response.json()
00858|               if (data.result && data.result.value && data.result.value.length > 0) {
00859|                 const tokenAccount = data.result.value[0]
00860|                 balance = BigInt(tokenAccount.account.data.parsed.info.tokenAmount.amount)
00861|               }
00862|             }
00863|             
00864|             const balanceFormatted = formatUnits(balance, currency.decimals)
00865|             
00866|             if (parseFloat(balanceFormatted) > 0.00000001) {
00867|               tokensWithBalances.push({
00868|                 token: currency,
00869|                 balance: balance.toString(),
00870|                 balanceFormatted,
00871|               })
00872|             }
00873|           } catch (e) {
00874|             console.error(`Failed to fetch Solana balance for ${currency.symbol}:`, e)
00875|           }
00876|         }
00877|         
00878|         if (tokensWithBalances.length > 0) {
00879|           const sorted = tokensWithBalances.sort((a, b) => parseFloat(b.balanceFormatted) - parseFloat(a.balanceFormatted))
00880|           setWalletTokens(sorted)
00881|           setBatchTokens(sorted.slice(0, 10))
00882|         }
00883|       } else {
00884|         // Unsupported VM type (bvm, tvm, etc.)
00885|         console.log(`VM type ${vmType} not yet supported for batch token detection`)
00886|         toast.info(`Batch swap for ${chain.displayName} (${vmType}) requires manual token selection`)
00887|         setIsLoadingBatchTokens(false)
00888|         return
00889|       }
00890|       
00891|       console.log('Tokens with balances found:', tokensWithBalances.length)
00892|       
00893|       const sorted = tokensWithBalances.sort((a, b) => parseFloat(b.balanceFormatted) - parseFloat(a.balanceFormatted))
00894|       
00895|       setWalletTokens(sorted)
00896|       setBatchTokens(sorted.slice(0, 10))
00897|       
00898|       if (tokensWithBalances.length > 0) {
00899|         toast.success(`Found ${tokensWithBalances.length} tokens with balance`)
00900|       } else {
00901|         toast.info('No tokens with balance found. Try a different chain or add tokens manually.')
00902|       }
00903|     } catch (error) {
00904|       console.error('=== Failed to load wallet tokens ===')
00905|       console.error('Error details:', error)
